_comment: Dev Metrics Agent — example configuration. Copy to config.json and populate. DO NOT commit config.json to Git.

sonarqube._comment: Remove this block entirely if your team does not use SonarQube. For SonarCloud use https://api.sonarcloud.io/mcp

jira._comment: Remove this block entirely if your team does not use Jira. For Atlassian Cloud, use https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/sse

teams.name: your-team-name
teams._comment: sonarqubeProjectKey required if sonarqube block is present. jiraProjectKey required if jira block is present.

output._comment: All fields optional. Defaults shown below match this repository's structure.
